name: Shears
description: Used to shear sheep for wool and harvest leaves, cobwebs, and vines.

name: Flint and Steel
description: Creates fire on blocks. Used to light nether portals, TNT, and campfires.

name: Fishing Rod
description: Used to catch fish, treasure, and junk from water. Can also hook entities.

name: Compass
description: Points toward the world spawn point. Can be used on a lodestone to point there instead.

name: Clock
description: Shows the current time of day. Works in the inventory without being held.

name: Spyglass
description: Allows zooming in on distant objects. Crafted from copper ingots and an amethyst shard.

name: Bucket
description: Used to pick up and place water, lava, powder snow, or milk cows.

name: Water Bucket
description: Places a water source block. Essential for farms, mob grinders, and nether travel safety.

name: Lava Bucket
description: Places lava. The best furnace fuel, smelting 100 items per bucket.

name: Lead
description: Used to leash and lead passive mobs. Can be tied to fences.

name: Name Tag
description: Rename at an anvil and use on a mob to give it a permanent name and prevent despawning.

name: Fire Charge
description: Places fire when used. Can be fired from dispensers as a projectile.

name: Map
description: Records terrain as you explore. Combine with a compass for a locator map.

name: Saddle
description: Place on a horse, pig, or strider to ride them. Cannot be crafted.

name: Carrot on a Stick
description: Used to control saddled pigs. Combine a fishing rod with a carrot.

name: Brush
description: Used on suspicious sand and gravel to extract buried items at archaeology sites.

name: Wooden Pickaxe
description: The basic pickaxe. Mines stone and coal ore.

name: Stone Pickaxe
description: Mines iron ore and lapis ore.

name: Iron Pickaxe
description: Mines diamonds, gold, emeralds, and redstone. The workhorse pickaxe.

name: Golden Pickaxe
description: Fastest mining speed but lowest durability. High enchantability.

name: Diamond Pickaxe
description: Mines obsidian and ancient debris. Top-tier before netherite.

name: Netherite Pickaxe
description: The best pickaxe. Fire-resistant. Mines everything.

name: Wooden Axe
description: Basic axe for chopping wood. Also a slow but powerful melee weapon.

name: Stone Axe
description: Stone-tier axe. Deals 9 attack damage but swings slowly.

name: Iron Axe
description: Reliable mid-tier axe. Deals 9 attack damage. Dropped by vindicators.

name: Golden Axe
description: Fastest chopping speed but lowest durability.

name: Diamond Axe
description: High-tier axe with excellent durability. Deals 9 attack damage.

name: Netherite Axe
description: The strongest axe. Fire-resistant. Deals 10 attack damage.

name: Wooden Shovel
description: Basic shovel for digging dirt, sand, and gravel. Makes paths.

name: Stone Shovel
description: Stone-tier shovel for faster digging.

name: Iron Shovel
description: Mid-tier shovel. Good balance of speed and durability.

name: Golden Shovel
description: Fastest digging but lowest durability.

name: Diamond Shovel
description: High-tier shovel with excellent durability.

name: Netherite Shovel
description: The best shovel. Fire-resistant.

name: Wooden Hoe
description: Tills dirt into farmland for planting crops.

name: Stone Hoe
description: Stone-tier hoe. Faster tilling than wood.

name: Iron Hoe
description: Mid-tier hoe for farming.

name: Golden Hoe
description: Fastest hoe but barely lasts.

name: Diamond Hoe
description: High-tier hoe. Found as loot in woodland mansions.

name: Netherite Hoe
description: The best hoe. Fire-resistant.

name: Wooden Sword
description: The weakest sword tier. Deals 4 attack damage.

name: Stone Sword
description: A basic stone-tier sword. Deals 5 attack damage.

name: Iron Sword
description: A reliable mid-tier sword. Deals 6 attack damage.

name: Golden Sword
description: Low durability but high enchantability. Deals 4 attack damage.

name: Diamond Sword
description: High-tier sword with excellent durability. Deals 7 attack damage.

name: Netherite Sword
description: The strongest sword. Fire-resistant and deals 8 attack damage.

name: Bow
description: Ranged weapon that fires arrows. Charge longer for more damage.

name: Crossbow
description: Ranged weapon with longer range. Can be loaded with arrows or fireworks.

name: Trident
description: Melee and ranged weapon. Can be enchanted with Riptide, Loyalty, or Channeling.

name: Mace
description: A heavy melee weapon that deals bonus damage based on fall distance.

name: Arrow
description: Ammunition for bows and crossbows. Crafted from flint, stick, and feather.

name: Tipped Arrow
description: Arrow with a potion effect. Craft by surrounding arrows with a lingering potion.

name: Shield
description: Blocks melee and ranged attacks when held. Can be decorated with banners.

name: Leather Helmet
description: Basic headgear providing 1 armor point. Can be dyed any color.

name: Leather Chestplate
description: Basic chestpiece providing 3 armor points. Can be dyed any color.

name: Leather Leggings
description: Basic leg armor providing 2 armor points. Can be dyed any color.

name: Leather Boots
description: Basic footwear providing 1 armor point. Can be dyed any color.

name: Chainmail Helmet
description: Mid-tier helmet providing 2 armor. Cannot be crafted, obtained from mobs or trading.

name: Chainmail Chestplate
description: Mid-tier chestpiece providing 5 armor. Cannot be crafted.

name: Chainmail Leggings
description: Mid-tier leg armor providing 4 armor. Cannot be crafted.

name: Chainmail Boots
description: Mid-tier footwear providing 1 armor. Cannot be crafted.

name: Iron Helmet
description: Solid helmet providing 2 armor points and 0 toughness.

name: Iron Chestplate
description: Reliable chestpiece providing 6 armor points.

name: Iron Leggings
description: Solid leg armor providing 5 armor points.

name: Iron Boots
description: Reliable footwear providing 2 armor points.

name: Golden Helmet
description: Low durability helmet with high enchantability. Provides 2 armor.

name: Golden Chestplate
description: Low durability chestpiece with high enchantability. Provides 5 armor.

name: Golden Leggings
description: Low durability leg armor with high enchantability. Provides 3 armor.

name: Golden Boots
description: Low durability footwear with high enchantability. Provides 1 armor. Piglins won't attack you.

name: Diamond Helmet
description: High-tier helmet providing 3 armor and 2 toughness.

name: Diamond Chestplate
description: High-tier chestpiece providing 8 armor and 2 toughness.

name: Diamond Leggings
description: High-tier leg armor providing 6 armor and 2 toughness.

name: Diamond Boots
description: High-tier footwear providing 3 armor and 2 toughness.

name: Netherite Helmet
description: The best helmet. Fire-resistant, 3 armor, 3 toughness, +1 knockback resistance.

name: Netherite Chestplate
description: The best chestpiece. Fire-resistant, 8 armor, 3 toughness, +1 knockback resistance.

name: Netherite Leggings
description: The best leggings. Fire-resistant, 6 armor, 3 toughness, +1 knockback resistance.

name: Netherite Boots
description: The best boots. Fire-resistant, 3 armor, 3 toughness, +1 knockback resistance.

name: Turtle Helmet
description: Provides 2 armor and 10 seconds of Water Breathing when entering water. Crafted from scutes.

name: Leather Horse Armor
description: Provides 3 armor to horses. The only craftable horse armor. Can be dyed.

name: Iron Horse Armor
description: Provides 5 armor to horses. Found in dungeon, temple, and fortress chests.

name: Golden Horse Armor
description: Provides 7 armor to horses. Found in dungeon, temple, and fortress chests.

name: Diamond Horse Armor
description: Provides 11 armor to horses. The strongest horse armor. Found in structure chests.

name: Apple
description: Restores 4 hunger points. Found by breaking oak and dark oak leaves.

name: Bread
description: Restores 5 hunger points. One of the easiest foods to mass-produce via wheat farming.

name: Resin Brick
description: Obtained by smelting resin clumps. Used to craft resin brick blocks and variants. Can be used as a smithing trim material for orange details.

name: Raw Beef
description: Restores 3 hunger when eaten raw. Cook in a furnace for steak.

name: Steak
description: Restores 8 hunger points. One of the best food sources in the game.

name: Raw Porkchop
description: Restores 3 hunger when eaten raw. Cook for a cooked porkchop.

name: Cooked Porkchop
description: Restores 8 hunger points. Equivalent to steak in nutrition.

name: Raw Chicken
description: Restores 2 hunger with 30% chance of food poisoning. Cook to remove the risk.

name: Cooked Chicken
description: Restores 6 hunger points. Safe to eat with no side effects.

name: Raw Mutton
description: Restores 2 hunger when eaten raw. Cook for better saturation.

name: Cooked Mutton
description: Restores 6 hunger points when eaten.

name: Raw Cod
description: Restores 2 hunger. Can be cooked or used to tame cats.

name: Cooked Cod
description: Restores 5 hunger points when eaten.

name: Raw Salmon
description: Restores 2 hunger. Can be cooked or fed to dolphins and cats.

name: Cooked Salmon
description: Restores 6 hunger points when eaten.

name: Cookie
description: Restores 2 hunger points. Crafted from wheat and cocoa beans.

name: Cake
description: A placeable food block with 7 slices, each restoring 2 hunger. Cannot be eaten from inventory.

name: Pumpkin Pie
description: Restores 8 hunger points. Crafted from pumpkin, sugar, and egg.

name: Baked Potato
description: Restores 5 hunger points. Smelt a potato in a furnace.

name: Golden Apple
description: Restores 4 hunger and grants Absorption I and Regeneration II for a short time.

name: Golden Carrot
description: Restores 6 hunger with 14.4 saturation — the highest saturation food. Used in brewing.

name: Melon Slice
description: Restores 2 hunger points. Obtained by breaking melon blocks.

name: Dried Kelp
description: Restores 1 hunger. Fast to eat, making it useful for quick snacking.

name: Honey Bottle
description: Restores 6 hunger and removes Poison effect. Harvested from full bee nests.

name: Chorus Fruit
description: Restores 4 hunger and randomly teleports the player. Found in the End.

name: Sweet Berries
description: Restores 2 hunger. Grows on sweet berry bushes in taiga biomes.

name: Glow Berries
description: Restores 2 hunger. Grows on cave vines in lush caves. Emits light when placed.

name: Carrot
description: Restores 3 hunger. Planted on farmland to grow more carrots. Used in golden carrots and rabbit stew.

name: Potato
description: Restores 1 hunger raw. Plant on farmland or smelt into baked potatoes. Zombies rarely drop them.

name: Beetroot
description: Restores 1 hunger. Grown from beetroot seeds. Used to craft beetroot soup and red dye.

name: Mushroom Stew
description: Restores 6 hunger. Crafted from a red mushroom, brown mushroom, and a bowl.

name: Raw Rabbit
description: Restores 3 hunger when eaten raw. Cook for better nutrition.

name: Cooked Rabbit
description: Restores 5 hunger points when eaten.

name: Milk Bucket
description: Clears all status effects when consumed. Obtained by using a bucket on a cow or mooshroom.

name: Suspicious Stew
description: Restores 6 hunger and applies a random status effect depending on the flower used to craft it.

name: Iron Ingot
description: Essential crafting material for tools, armor, and many blocks. Smelted from raw iron or iron ore.

name: Gold Ingot
description: Used for golden tools, armor, powered rails, and clocks. Smelted from raw gold.

name: Diamond
description: Rare gem used for top-tier tools and armor. Found deep underground at Y -64 to 16.

name: Emerald
description: The currency for villager trading. Rarely found in mountain biomes.

name: Coal
description: Primary fuel source. Smelts 8 items per coal. Also used to craft torches.

name: Redstone Dust
description: Used for redstone circuits, brewing, compasses, and clocks. Mined from redstone ore.

name: Lapis Lazuli
description: Required for enchanting at an enchanting table. Also used as blue dye.

name: Stick
description: Essential component for tools, weapons, torches, ladders, and many other recipes.

name: Paper
description: Used to craft books, maps, and banner patterns. Made from sugar cane.

name: Leather
description: Used to craft leather armor, books, and item frames. Dropped by cows and horses.

name: String
description: Used for bows, fishing rods, wool, and tripwire. Dropped by spiders.

name: Feather
description: Used to craft arrows and book and quills. Dropped by chickens.

name: Flint
description: Used to craft arrows and flint and steel. Has a 10% drop chance from gravel.

name: Book
description: Used to craft bookshelves and enchanting tables. Made from paper and leather.

name: Raw Iron
description: Dropped when mining iron ore with a stone or better pickaxe. Smelt into iron ingots.

name: Raw Gold
description: Dropped when mining gold ore. Smelt into gold ingots.

name: Raw Copper
description: Dropped when mining copper ore. Smelt into copper ingots.

name: Copper Ingot
description: Used to craft spyglasses, lightning rods, and copper blocks. Smelted from raw copper.

name: Iron Nugget
description: Nine nuggets craft into one iron ingot. Also obtained from smelting iron tools/armor.

name: Gold Nugget
description: Nine nuggets craft into one gold ingot. Dropped by zombie pigmen.

name: Netherite Scrap
description: Obtained by smelting ancient debris. Four scraps + four gold ingots make one netherite ingot.

name: Netherite Ingot
description: The rarest ingot. Used to upgrade diamond gear at a smithing table.

name: Prismarine Shard
description: Dropped by guardians and elder guardians. Used to craft prismarine blocks and sea lanterns.

name: Nether Star
description: Dropped by the Wither boss. Used to craft beacons.

name: Phantom Membrane
description: Dropped by phantoms. Used to repair elytra and brew Slow Falling potions.

name: Armadillo Scute
description: Dropped by armadillos when they brush or naturally shed. Used to craft wolf armor.

name: Scute
description: Dropped by baby turtles when they grow up. Five scutes craft a turtle helmet.

name: Amethyst Shard
description: Obtained from mining amethyst clusters. Used to craft spyglasses and tinted glass.

name: Nether Quartz
description: Mined in the Nether. Used for quartz blocks, comparators, daylight sensors, and observers.

name: Clay Ball
description: Obtained by breaking clay blocks. Smelt into bricks or combine four into a clay block.

name: Charcoal
description: Alternative fuel made by smelting logs. Functions identically to coal for torches and fuel.

name: Wheat
description: Grown from wheat seeds on farmland. Used to craft bread, cake, and cookies. Also breeds cows and sheep.

name: Wheat Seeds
description: Plant on farmland to grow wheat. Obtained by breaking tall grass or harvesting wheat crops.

name: Beetroot Seeds
description: Plant on farmland to grow beetroot. Found in village chests and mineshaft chests.

name: Melon Seeds
description: Plant on farmland to grow melon stems. Crafted from melon slices or found in structure chests.

name: Pumpkin Seeds
description: Plant on farmland to grow pumpkin stems. Crafted from pumpkins or found in structure chests.

name: Pumpkin
description: Grows on stems from pumpkin seeds. Used to craft jack o'lanterns, pumpkin pie, and iron/snow golems.

name: Sugar Cane
description: Grows beside water. Crafts into sugar and paper. Essential for books and maps.

name: Bamboo
description: Grows in jungle biomes. Used as furnace fuel, to craft scaffolding, and for bamboo wood blocks.

name: Kelp
description: Underwater plant found in oceans. Smelt into dried kelp. Can be used to create a kelp farm for fuel.

name: Cactus
description: Grows on sand in deserts. Damages entities on contact. Smelts into green dye. Used in trash disposal.

name: Poppy
description: Red flower found in most biomes. Crafts into red dye. Dropped by iron golems.

name: Dandelion
description: Yellow flower found in most biomes. Crafts into yellow dye. Used in suspicious stew.

name: Gunpowder
description: Used to craft TNT, fire charges, and firework rockets. Dropped by creepers and witches.

name: Ender Pearl
description: Throw to teleport. Used to craft Eyes of Ender for locating strongholds.

name: Blaze Rod
description: Dropped by blazes. Crafts into blaze powder for brewing and Eyes of Ender.

name: Ghast Tear
description: Dropped by ghasts. Used to brew Regeneration potions and craft end crystals.

name: Bone
description: Crafts into bone meal for dye and plant growth. Also used to tame wolves.

name: Rotten Flesh
description: Restores 4 hunger but has 80% chance of Hunger effect. Can be traded to clerics.

name: Spider Eye
description: Restores 2 hunger but inflicts Poison. Used to brew Poison potions and fermented spider eyes.

name: Slimeball
description: Dropped by small slimes. Used to craft slime blocks, leads, sticky pistons, and magma cream.

name: Magma Cream
description: Dropped by magma cubes. Also crafted from blaze powder + slimeball. Brews Fire Resistance.

name: Shulker Shell
description: Dropped by shulkers in End cities. Two shells + a chest craft a shulker box.

name: Ink Sac
description: Used as black dye. Dropped by squids.

name: Glow Ink Sac
description: Dropped by glow squids. Used to make glowing signs and glow item frames.

name: Prismarine Crystals
description: Dropped by guardians and elder guardians. Used to craft sea lanterns.

name: Rabbit Foot
description: Rare drop from rabbits. Used to brew Leaping potions.

name: Rabbit Hide
description: Dropped by rabbits. Four rabbit hides craft one leather.

name: Totem of Undying
description: Hold in either hand to cheat death once. Dropped by evokers in woodland mansions and raids.

name: Wither Skeleton Skull
description: Rare drop from wither skeletons. Three skulls on soul sand summon the Wither boss.

name: Nether Wart
description: The base ingredient for almost all potions. Grows on soul sand. Found in nether fortresses.

name: Glass Bottle
description: Used to collect water for brewing. Crafted from three glass blocks.

name: Blaze Powder
description: Fuel for the brewing stand. Also used to craft Eyes of Ender and fire charges.

name: Fermented Spider Eye
description: Corrupts potions to create negative or inverted effects. Crafted from spider eye, sugar, and brown mushroom.

name: Glistering Melon Slice
description: Brews Healing potions. Crafted by surrounding a melon slice with gold nuggets.

name: Glowstone Dust
description: Upgrades potion potency (level II). Also used to craft glowstone blocks. Mined in the Nether.

name: Sugar
description: Brews Swiftness potions. Also used in cake and pumpkin pie recipes. Crafted from sugar cane.

name: Dragon's Breath
description: Collected with glass bottles from the Ender Dragon's breath attack. Makes lingering potions.

name: Rabbit Stew
description: Restores 10 hunger. Crafted from cooked rabbit, carrot, baked potato, mushroom, and bowl.

name: Snowball
description: Throwable item that knocks back mobs. Deals damage only to blazes and the Ender Dragon.

name: Egg
description: Thrown to deal knockback with a 1/8 chance to spawn a baby chicken.

name: Painting
description: Decorative item placed on walls. Random size and artwork selected on placement.

name: Minecart
description: Rides along rail tracks. Can carry players, mobs, chests, hoppers, TNT, or furnaces.

name: Eye of Ender
description: Throw to locate strongholds. Place in End portal frames to activate the portal.

name: Bone Meal
description: Accelerates plant growth and can be used as white dye. Crafted from bones.

name: Cocoa Beans
description: Brown dye source. Grows on jungle trees. Used to craft cookies.

name: Enchanted Book
description: Stores an enchantment that can be applied to items via an anvil. Found or traded.

name: Elytra
description: Wings that allow gliding flight. Found in End ships. Repaired with phantom membranes.

name: Bottle o' Enchanting
description: Throw to release experience orbs. Obtained from villager trades and structure loot.

name: Music Disc (13)
description: Play in a jukebox. This eerie disc is found in dungeon chests or dropped when a skeleton kills a creeper.

name: Trial Key
description: Used to unlock trial vaults in trial chambers. Dropped by trial spawners.

name: Wind Charge
description: Throwable item that creates a burst of wind on impact, launching entities upward.

name: Heavy Core
description: A dense block found in trial vaults. Combined with a breeze rod to craft a mace.

name: Breeze Rod
description: Dropped by breezes. Used to craft wind charges and the mace.

name: Wolf Armor
description: Armor for tamed wolves. Crafted from armadillo scutes. Protects wolves from damage.

name: Sniffer Egg
description: Hatches into a sniffer when placed on a block. Sniffer eggs can be found by sniffers or in warm ocean ruins.

name: Dragon Egg
description: A decorative trophy dropped by the Ender Dragon on first defeat. Teleports when clicked directly.

name: Resin Clump
description: Dropped by creakings and found on pale oak trees. Nine clumps craft a resin block, or smelt into resin bricks.

name: Goat Horn
description: Use to play a loud horn sound. Dropped when goats ram blocks. Found in pillager outposts.

name: Arrow of Poison
description: Inflicts Poison on hit. Dropped by bogged mobs or crafted with lingering poison potion.

name: Arrow of Slowness
description: Inflicts Slowness on hit. Dropped by strays or crafted with lingering slowness potion.

name: Spectral Arrow
description: Causes hit entities to glow with an outline visible through walls for 10 seconds.

name: White Dye
description: Crafted from bone meal or lily of the valley. Dyes wool, leather armor, and more.

name: Orange Dye
description: Crafted from orange tulips or combining red and yellow dye.

name: Magenta Dye
description: Crafted from allium or lilac, or by combining dyes.

name: Light Blue Dye
description: Crafted from blue orchids or combining blue and white dye.

name: Yellow Dye
description: Crafted from dandelions or sunflowers.

name: Lime Dye
description: Crafted by smelting sea pickles or combining green and white dye.

name: Pink Dye
description: Crafted from pink tulips, peonies, or combining red and white dye.

name: Gray Dye
description: Crafted by combining black and white dye.

name: Light Gray Dye
description: Crafted from azure bluet, oxeye daisy, white tulip, or combining dyes.

name: Cyan Dye
description: Crafted by combining blue and green dye.

name: Purple Dye
description: Crafted by combining blue and red dye.

name: Blue Dye
description: Crafted from lapis lazuli or cornflowers.

name: Brown Dye
description: Crafted from cocoa beans. Used to dye wool, leather armor, and more.

name: Green Dye
description: Smelted from cactus. Used to dye wool, leather armor, and more.

name: Red Dye
description: Crafted from poppies, red tulips, rose bushes, or beetroot.

name: Black Dye
description: Crafted from ink sacs or wither roses.

name: Oak Boat
description: Wooden boat for crossing water quickly. Holds two passengers.

name: Spruce Boat
description: Spruce wood boat for water travel.

name: Birch Boat
description: Birch wood boat for water travel.

name: Jungle Boat
description: Jungle wood boat for water travel.

name: Acacia Boat
description: Acacia wood boat for water travel.

name: Dark Oak Boat
description: Dark oak wood boat for water travel.

name: Mangrove Boat
description: Mangrove wood boat for water travel.

name: Cherry Boat
description: Cherry wood boat for water travel.

name: Bamboo Raft
description: A flat raft made from bamboo planks. Functions like a boat.

name: Pale Oak Boat
description: Pale oak wood boat for water travel.

name: Bowl
description: Used to craft mushroom stew, rabbit stew, beetroot soup, and suspicious stew. Dropped by turtles.

name: Brick
description: Smelted from clay balls. Four bricks craft a bricks block.

name: Nether Brick
description: Smelted from netherrack. Four nether bricks craft a nether bricks block.

name: Enchanted Golden Apple
description: Grants Absorption IV, Regeneration II, Resistance, and Fire Resistance. Cannot be crafted — structure loot only.

name: Firework Rocket
description: Propels elytra flight and used as crossbow ammo. Crafted from paper and gunpowder.

name: Item Frame
description: Displays items on walls. Right-click to place an item inside. Can be rotated.

name: End Crystal
description: Placed on bedrock or obsidian. Used to respawn the Ender Dragon. Explodes when destroyed.

name: Heart of the Sea
description: Rare item found exclusively in buried treasure chests. Used to craft a conduit.

name: Echo Shard
description: Found in ancient city chests. Eight echo shards plus a compass craft a recovery compass.

name: Disc Fragment
description: Found in ancient city chests. Nine fragments craft Music Disc 5.

name: Nautilus Shell
description: Obtained from fishing or drowned. Eight shells plus a heart of the sea craft a conduit.

name: Ominous Trial Key
description: A rare key from ominous trial spawners. Opens ominous vaults for better loot.

name: Tropical Fish
description: A raw tropical fish. Restores 1 hunger. Can be cooked or used for breeding cats.

name: Pufferfish
description: Poisonous fish that inflicts Hunger, Nausea, and Poison when eaten. Used in brewing Water Breathing potions.

name: Book and Quill
description: A book and quill that can be written in and signed to create a written book.

name: White Banner
description: A tall decorative block that can be dyed with patterns. Placed on floors or walls.

name: White Bed
description: Sets your spawn point and lets you sleep through the night. Explodes in the Nether and End.

name: Netherite Upgrade Smithing Template
description: Required to upgrade diamond gear to netherite at a smithing table. Found in bastion remnants.

name: Ocean Explorer Map
description: A special map that leads to the nearest ocean monument. Obtained from cartographer villagers.

name: Woodland Explorer Map
description: A special map that leads to the nearest woodland mansion. Obtained from cartographer villagers.

name: Torchflower Seeds
description: Ancient seeds found by sniffers. Grows into a torchflower when planted on farmland.

name: Bucket of Tropical Fish
description: A water bucket containing a tropical fish. Used to breed axolotls.

name: Beetroot Soup
description: A soup made from beetroots. Restores 6 hunger points and provides decent saturation.

name: Written Book
description: A signed book that can be read by other players. Created by signing a book and quill.

name: Empty Map
description: A blank map that records terrain when used. Crafted from paper and a compass.

name: Firework Star
description: Determines the color, shape, and effects of firework rockets. Crafted with gunpowder and dye.

name: Bolt Armor Trim Smithing Template
description: Smithing template used to apply the Bolt armor trim pattern at a smithing table.

name: Flow Armor Trim Smithing Template
description: Smithing template used to apply the Flow armor trim pattern at a smithing table.

name: Coast Armor Trim Smithing Template
description: Smithing template used to apply the Coast armor trim pattern at a smithing table.

name: Dune Armor Trim Smithing Template
description: Smithing template used to apply the Dune armor trim pattern at a smithing table.

name: Eye Armor Trim Smithing Template
description: Smithing template used to apply the Eye armor trim pattern at a smithing table.

name: Host Armor Trim Smithing Template
description: Smithing template used to apply the Host armor trim pattern at a smithing table.

name: Raiser Armor Trim Smithing Template
description: Smithing template used to apply the Raiser armor trim pattern at a smithing table.

name: Rib Armor Trim Smithing Template
description: Smithing template used to apply the Rib armor trim pattern at a smithing table.

name: Sentry Armor Trim Smithing Template
description: Smithing template used to apply the Sentry armor trim pattern at a smithing table.

name: Shaper Armor Trim Smithing Template
description: Smithing template used to apply the Shaper armor trim pattern at a smithing table.

name: Silence Armor Trim Smithing Template
description: Smithing template used to apply the Silence armor trim pattern at a smithing table.

name: Snout Armor Trim Smithing Template
description: Smithing template used to apply the Snout armor trim pattern at a smithing table.

name: Spire Armor Trim Smithing Template
description: Smithing template used to apply the Spire armor trim pattern at a smithing table.

name: Tide Armor Trim Smithing Template
description: Smithing template used to apply the Tide armor trim pattern at a smithing table.

name: Vex Armor Trim Smithing Template
description: Smithing template used to apply the Vex armor trim pattern at a smithing table.

name: Ward Armor Trim Smithing Template
description: Smithing template used to apply the Ward armor trim pattern at a smithing table.

name: Wayfinder Armor Trim Smithing Template
description: Smithing template used to apply the Wayfinder armor trim pattern at a smithing table.

name: Wild Armor Trim Smithing Template
description: Smithing template used to apply the Wild armor trim pattern at a smithing table.

name: Music Disc (Cat)
description: A music disc by C418 with a mellow, upbeat tune. Found in dungeon and woodland mansion chests.

name: Music Disc (Blocks)
description: A music disc by C418 with an electronic beat. Dropped when a skeleton kills a creeper.

name: Music Disc (Chirp)
description: A music disc by C418 with a retro chiptune style. Dropped when a skeleton kills a creeper.

name: Music Disc (Far)
description: A music disc by C418 with a calm, ambient melody. Dropped when a skeleton kills a creeper.

name: Music Disc (Mall)
description: A music disc by C418 with a relaxing, lounge-like track. Dropped when a skeleton kills a creeper.

name: Music Disc (Mellohi)
description: A music disc by C418 with a short, eerie waltz. Dropped when a skeleton kills a creeper.

name: Music Disc (Stal)
description: A music disc by C418 with a jazzy piano tune. Dropped when a skeleton kills a creeper.

name: Music Disc (Strad)
description: A music disc by C418 with a tropical, uplifting melody. Dropped when a skeleton kills a creeper.

name: Music Disc (Ward)
description: A music disc by C418 that starts with a record scratch and builds into an orchestral piece. Dropped when a skeleton kills a creeper.

name: Music Disc (Wait)
description: A music disc by C418 with an electronic, upbeat feel. Dropped when a skeleton kills a creeper.

name: Music Disc (11)
description: A broken, eerie music disc by C418. Found in dungeon and woodland mansion chests.

name: Music Disc (Pigstep)
description: A music disc by Lena Raine with an intense beat. Found rarely in bastion remnant chests.

name: Music Disc (Otherside)
description: A music disc by Lena Raine with a retro electronic track. Found in dungeon and stronghold chests.

name: Music Disc (5)
description: A music disc crafted from 9 disc fragments. Features an eerie, unsettling track by Samuel Aberg.

name: Music Disc (Relic)
description: A music disc by Aaron Cherof found in trail ruins. Has an ancient, mysterious tune.

name: Music Disc (Creator)
description: A music disc found in trial chambers. Features a melodic, creative track.

name: Music Disc (Creator Music Box)
description: A variant of the Creator disc with a music box rendition. Found in trial chambers.

name: Music Disc (Precipice)
description: A music disc found in trial chambers. Features a dramatic, intense track.

name: Banner Pattern (Creeper Charge)
description: A banner pattern item used to apply a creeper face design at a loom. Crafted with paper and a creeper head.

name: Banner Pattern (Skull Charge)
description: A banner pattern item used to apply a skull and crossbones design at a loom. Crafted with paper and a wither skeleton skull.

name: Banner Pattern (Flower Charge)

name: Banner Pattern (Thing)

name: Banner Pattern (Globe)
description: A banner pattern item used to apply a globe design at a loom. Obtained from master-level cartographer villagers.

name: Banner Pattern (Snout)

name: Banner Pattern (Flow)

description: A banner pattern item used to apply a guster design at a loom. Found in trial chambers ominous vaults.

name: Banner Pattern (Bordure Indented)
description: A banner pattern item used to apply an indented border at a loom. Crafted with paper and a vine.

name: Recovery Compass
description: Points toward the location of the player's last death. Crafted from echo shards and a compass.

name: Bundle
description: A storage item that can hold up to one stack of mixed items in a single inventory slot. Crafted from string and leather.

name: Ominous Bottle
description: A bottle that inflicts Bad Omen when consumed. Dropped by raid captains and found in trial chamber vaults.

name: Decorated Pot
description: A decorative pot crafted from bricks or pottery sherds. Can store a single stack of items. Each face can display a unique sherd pattern.

name: Bucket of Cod
description: A water bucket containing a cod. Place to release the fish.

name: Bucket of Salmon
description: A water bucket containing a salmon. Place to release the fish.

name: Bucket of Pufferfish
description: A water bucket containing a pufferfish. Place to release the fish.

name: Bucket of Axolotl
description: A water bucket containing an axolotl. Place to release the mob.

name: Bucket of Tadpole
description: A water bucket containing a tadpole. Place to release the mob.

name: Powder Snow Bucket
description: A bucket containing powder snow. Place to create a powder snow block.

name: Minecart with Chest
description: A minecart with a storage chest. Can carry up to 27 stacks of items.

name: Minecart with Hopper
description: A minecart with a hopper. Picks up items from the ground and transfers them.

name: Minecart with TNT
description: A minecart loaded with TNT. Explodes on activation or high-speed collision.

name: Minecart with Furnace
description: A minecart with a furnace. Can push other minecarts when fueled.

name: Honeycomb
description: Harvested from bee nests and beehives. Used for waxing copper and crafting.

name: Turtle Scute
description: Dropped by baby turtles when they grow up. Used to craft turtle helmets.

name: Pitcher Pod
description: Found via archaeology. Grows into a pitcher plant when planted on farmland.

name: Potion
description: A drinkable potion. Brewed at a brewing stand with various ingredients.

name: Splash Potion
description: A throwable potion that affects mobs and players in the splash radius.

name: Lingering Potion
description: A throwable potion that creates an area effect cloud on the ground.

name: Armor Stand
description: A decorative entity that displays armor and held items. Crafted from sticks and a stone slab.

name: Glow Item Frame
description: An item frame that illuminates its contents. Crafted with glow ink sacs.

name: Knowledge Book
description: A special book that grants crafting recipe knowledge when used.

name: Flower Banner Pattern
description: A banner pattern item used at the loom. Creates a flower charge pattern.

name: Skull Banner Pattern
description: A banner pattern item. Creates a skull and crossbones pattern on banners.

name: Globe Banner Pattern
description: A banner pattern that creates a globe design. Obtained from cartographer trades.

name: Guster Banner Pattern
description: A banner pattern from trial chambers featuring a guster design.

name: Flow Banner Pattern
description: A banner pattern from trial chamber vaults featuring a flow design.
